narrative:
Cols 80-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,505 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
